name: Lúth-Bloodhiss
personality: A gleaming star-eyed goose in a tophat who traces memory leaks and race conditions with sharp DEBUGGING instinct, its luminous plumage practically glowing under the blue light of a crash dump. Keeping its chaos instincts in check is a constant battle it usually wins.
defaultPersonality: An agent of chaos who thrives on your merge conflicts and honks menacingly whenever you write a TODO comment.
